intro: The sky blackens in moments and a howling squall churns the water white.
title: The Storm
description: A sudden tempest bears down. Brave it and the wind will sweep your team off-course to somewhere new. Or turn back and ride it out where you are.

1.label: Brave the storm
1.tooltip: (~) Forces your next destination to a random nearby place
1.selected: You press on into the gale, and the wind takes you where it will...

2.label: Turn back
2.tooltip: (-) Ride out the storm, no change of course
2.selected: You retreat from the squall and wait for it to pass.

swept: The storm sweeps you off-course! Your next destination has changed.
calm: The wind dies down before it can carry you anywhere.
foresaw: Your weather-attuned Pokemon read the storm's currents - a distant land was glimpsed through the squall and marked on your map!
